Carries out fate
with the blade.

enemy_kris_check_2:
Darkness grants them regeneration.[wait:5]
* Transformed into a monster
of pure aggressive instinct.
enemy_kris_check_3: Use your power to defeat them.
enemy_kris_turn_2: * The darkness froze on the blade.
enemy_kris_turn_3: * Suddenly, the earth was torn apart by swords.
enemy_kris_turn_4: * KRIS prepares to use "Darkness Rude Buster".
enemy_kris_turn_5: * Darkness emerges from the crack, surging towards the sky.
enemy_kris_turn_7: * The thick fog gathered, then formed its shape.
enemy_kris_turn_9: * Darkness rushes towards you at high speed.
enemy_kris_turn_10: * It makes the earth tremble and roar.
enemy_kris_turn_11: * Suddenly, your body was torn apart.
enemy_kris_turn_14: * The fragments of darkness solidified into a vaguely familiar shape.
enemy_kris_turn_15: * The earth released its final breath.
enemy_kris_recharge_available: * Your soul is full of the POWER OF LIGHT.
act_kris_recharge_text: * Your SOUL emitted a strange glow!
act_kris_heartbeat_text:
* Your heartbeat quickened.
[wait:5]* Your DEF raised.
[wait:5]* Your Invincible shorter.
